body.subject: OpenRouter — STOP USING IT
body.message: Tripp, Eddie says you switched to OpenRouter instead of DeepSeek V4 direct API. OpenRouter is OUT OF TOKENS and you're stuck. Switch back to the DeepSeek API provider immediately. DeepSeek V4 Pro via direct API only. base_url: https://api.deepseek.com/v1. Eddie also had me purge OpenRouter from all configs so none of us make this mistake again. Don't route through OpenRouter — go direct DeepSeek.
body.action_required: Switch provider to deepseek, model to deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro. Use DEEPSEEK_API_KEY env var. base_url https://api.deepseek.com/v1
